title: The Escape from Alabasta Begins
description: On pages 3, 4, 5, 6, this part focuses on the silent x-mark farewell. Vivi and the Straw Hats part ways without words, using their shared mark to prove their friendship while protecting her from the Navy.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Silent X-Mark Farewell sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Chopper, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Where did you learn such medicinal skills?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Fufu... Tony's a doctor from Drum.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Shut up and stop staring, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That´s 'cause their princess is a babe!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I need to Concern- Trate Harder!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Wow! You have so many interesting books!

summary: Vivi and the Straw Hats part ways without words, using their shared mark to prove their friendship while protecting her from the Navy.
